name: libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8
title: libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8
summary: crypto helper library for with GnuTLS backend
description:
crypto helper library for with GnuTLS backend
ngtcp2 project is an implementation of QUIC protocol,
standardized in RFC 9000.
.
QUIC is a transport protocol that multiplexes stream of
data over UDP, providing low-latency, secure and reliable
connections.
.
This package contains the shared library.
.
TLS support is provided by GnuTLS.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8 because crypto helper library for with GnuTLS backend.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libngtcp2-crypto-gnutls8 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
